title: Pet Age Calculator - Dog Years to Human Years & Cat Age Calculator
note: Based on AVMA veterinary guidelines. First year = 15 human years, second year = +9, each additional year varies by breed size for dogs. Cats age ~4 human years per year after age 2.
seoDescription: Convert your dog or cat's age to human years instantly. Enter your pet's age, breed size, and species to get an accurate human-equivalent age. Uses AVMA veterinary formulas — the old multiply-by-7 rule is outdated. Free pet age calculator for dogs and cats.
